final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial sports photo, square crop
Primary request: a muscular athlete performing a deadlift in a professional gym, conveying raw power and masculine energy with visible sweat and defined muscle lines
Scene/backdrop: industrial-style gym interior, exposed concrete walls, metal racks, heavy iron plates, dim industrial ceiling lights
Subject: male athlete with sharply defined muscle striations, veins visible on forearms and arms, gripping a loaded barbell mid-deadlift, sweat droplets on skin
Style/medium: photorealistic editorial sports photography
Composition/framing: medium shot, slight low-angle, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field to isolate the athlete
Lighting/mood: cool-toned dramatic lighting, hard shadows, blue-grey industrial ambiance, intense and powerful mood
Color palette: cool steel blue + dark charcoal grey + warm skin tone contrast + chrome barbell highlights
Materials/textures: rough knurled barbell steel, chalk dust on hands, glistening sweat on skin, concrete floor texture
Constraints: keep athlete as sole focal point, no other people in frame, maintain cool color temperature throughout
Avoid: cartoonish muscles, over-smoothed skin, warm golden tones, watermark, plastic sheen
